title: Cross-Chain Activity Report
description: Full cross-chain footprint for any wallet — active chains, combined net worth, unified transaction timeline, and per-chain asset breakdown in one API call.
useCase: Build a cross-chain analytics page that shows every chain a wallet has ever been active on, their total net worth across all chains, and a unified activity timeline — like DeBank's portfolio but self-hosted.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to generate the cross-chain activity report for
